headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Atmos Energy, Raises Price Target to $184
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Atmos Energy (NYSE:ATO) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $167 to $184.

headline: Atos drives Alsea’s SAP modernization with a strategic migration to SAP RISE on AWS
summary: Press Release Atos drives Alsea’s SAP modernization with a strategic migration to SAP RISE on AWS Madrid and Paris, April 8, 2026 – Atos, a global leader in digital transformation powered by artificial intelligence and recognized for its expertise in highly complex projects, announces today it has been selected by Alsea—one of the largest restaurant operators in Latin America and Europe, with more than 4,000 establishments in 11 countries and international brands such as Starbucks, Domino’s Pizz

headline: Barclays Lifts Atmos Energy (ATO) PT Ahead of Utilities Q1 Preview
summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) is included among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On April 7, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) to $184 from $167. The firm kept an Equal Weight rating while updating its outlook for the North America power and utilities group as […]
